name: Pax New Mini 2
summary: A compact one-button conduction vaporiser from PAX, for patients who want simple, reliable dosing.
description: The PAX Mini 2 strips things back to one-button operation with four intelligent heat modes that adjust automatically through the session, so there's nothing to fiddle with. Conduction heating gets it ready in about 22 seconds, and half-pack and full-pack oven lids let you match the load to how much you need. Charging is via a magnetic USB-C cable, with a 2-year warranty. It holds up to 0.25g and suits a patient who wants a pocketable, low-maintenance device without presets or apps to learn. Conduction means it's best loaded and used promptly rather than left part-finished.
